description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, upholstered in a dark charcoal gray fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and shape, providing a clean and minimalist look. The armrests are straight, low, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. The base and legs are constructed from wood, with a visible wooden panel running along the back and short, square wooden legs at each corner and one central support. The upholstery is solid in color with a subtle woven texture, and the overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments. The sofa's generous proportions and deep seating make it ideal for lounging and social gatherings.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in dark charcoal gray fabric with a wooden base and straight, padded armrests. It features uniform seat and back cushions and a minimalist, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shaped layout, three seat and back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, padded armrest on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the arrangement of the sofa's legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the chaise extension and the left armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all loose and arranged in a sectional L-shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests at both ends, padded and matching the backrest height, with a boxy, minimalist design and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, square wooden legs positioned at the corners and one central support, exposed with a natural wood finish and simple, blocky style.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
